ddls:
CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., Process digitisation) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the service is hosted */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "geoextent" TEXT /* Geographical extent of the service (e.g., National, Local) */,
  "geocoverage" TEXT /* Geographical coverage of the service (e.g., France) */,
  "lead_organisation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead organization offering the service */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the service */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the service */,
  "primary_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary sector the service belongs to */,
  "secondary_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the secondary sector the service belongs to */,
  "cross_sector" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is cross-sector */,
  "cross_border" INTEGER /* Indicates if the service is cross-border */,
  "technology" TEXT /* Technology used in the service (e.g., API) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the service (e.g., In production) */,
  "uptake" TEXT /* Uptake of the service (e.g., Unknown) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was last modified */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the service */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the service */,
  "data_sources" TEXT /* List of external data sources the service integrates with */,
  "geospatial_api_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if geospatial APIs are used */,
  "audit_logs_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if audit logs are enabled for the service */,
  "compliance_standards" TEXT /* List of compliance standards the service adheres to */,
  "cross_sector_collaboration" TEXT /* Description of cross-sector collaboration efforts */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* Average user rating for the service */,
  "user_feedback_count" INTEGER /* Number of user feedback entries for the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_secondary_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("secondary_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_primary_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("primary_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_lead_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the organization (e.g., Governmental) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the organization */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary sector the organization belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organisations_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Agriculture, Education) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent sector (for hierarchical sectors) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the sector */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sector is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., citizen, student, admin) */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the user belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "authentication_method" TEXT /* Method used for user authentication (e.g., FranceConnect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the service */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, use) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the service */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  "resolution_text" TEXT /* Text of the resolution provided for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_feedback_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id")
)
